src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger annotations and imports with SpringDoc OpenAPI equivalents.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Jakarta EE namespaces) and does not support OpenAPI 3.0 natively; code fails to compile or run due to missing classes or namespace conflicts.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Migrate Swagger annotations from the legacy io.swagger.annotations package to the OpenAPI 3.0 io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations package.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: The io.swagger.annotations package is deprecated and removed in newer SpringDoc/Spring Boot versions; code fails to compile without the new imports and annotation types.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.before:
import io.swagger.annotations.ApiOperation;
@ApiOperation(value = "Create new article", response = ArticleDto.class)

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Update Swagger response annotations to use the new OpenAPI 3.0 attribute names (responseCode, description).
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: The old ApiResponse attributes (code, message) do not exist in the new io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.responses.ApiResponse class, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Replace legacy ApiParam and ApiImplicitParam annotations with the new OpenAPI 3.0 Parameter and Parameters annotations.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: The old ApiParam and ApiImplicitParam classes are removed in the new library, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from the javax.validation package to the jakarta.validation package.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration removed javax.validation; using it causes NoClassDefFoundError or compilation failure.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate Swagger annotations from v2 (io.swagger.annotations) to v3 (io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations) to align with OpenAPI 3.0 standards.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: The io.swagger.annotations package is deprecated and often removed in newer SpringDoc/SpringFox versions; using it causes compile errors or missing API documentation in Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate Java EE validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+, which renames the javax.* packages to jakarta.*. Using javax.validation causes ClassNotFoundException or compile errors.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate Swagger 2 annotations to Swagger 3 (OpenAPI 3) annotations.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: The package io.swagger.annotations is removed in SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x/Spring Boot 3.x; code fails to compile without the new io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations package.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation annotations to jakarta.validation annotations.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3.x; code fails to compile without the new jakarta.validation package.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Migrate persistence import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Update Hibernate Types import from com.vladmihalcea to io.hypersistence.utils.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: The library was renamed/repackaged; old imports result in compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Update @Type annotation to use class reference instead of string name.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.why_exists: String-based type names are deprecated or removed in newer Hibernate versions; class references are required.
